title: Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon, Silver, 3mm x 10m, Elegant Shine for Card Making, Scrapbooks, Gift Wrapping and Other Craft Projects
features: DOUBLE-SIDED SATIN SHEEN – The ribbon has a shiny and smooth surface on both sides for a professional and symmetrical effect. Soft and silky material that can be used to make different shapes

STUNNING COLOURS – With 24 bright colours to choose from you’ll certainly find a fitting match for any project and season! From bold primary colours that are perfect for holiday decorations to sweet pastels for baby showers

PERFECT FOR CRAFT PROJECTS – Ribbons are very adaptable and can be used in just about any craft project. Use them to make ribbon wreaths and baby toys or weave a line of ribbon through a card to add a lovely effect. Scrapbookers can use ribbon to decorate a cover, frame a picture or as a bookmark! Ribbons are great to have on hand in your craft room

HANDY PACKAGING – Durable flat round cardboard spool that you can hang up or stack with other colours for easy storage. Special slots on either side of the spool to place the end of the ribbon after use ensure the ribbon can be wound up nice and tidy
MEASUREMENTS – Each pack contains 1 spool of ribbon, measuring 3 mm wide by 10 metres long. The ribbon is easy to cut with scissors so can be cut to any preferred length
description: The high-quality double satin ribbon from Vaessen Creative has a smooth and shiny surface on both sides and is therefore particularly versatile. The elegant decorative ribbon is 10 metres long and decorates many DIY craft and decoration projects. It can be threaded through homemade cards and serves as a closure of folding cards, bags and gifts. The decorative items are also popular in floristry and table decorations. There it adorns, among other things, lanterns and flower vases. Even the hair can be decorated with the soft ribbon, in the shape of a bow or as a flower on a clip. Depending on the occasion, the satin ribbon can be used again and again. It can be used as a car bow at weddings as well as to tie the rings on the ring cushion. For Christmas, it serves as a hanging ribbon for Christmas tree baubles and as a ribbon in the Advent wreath. Working with satin ribbon is popular with adults and children, beginners as well as craft artists alike. It is easy to cut and tie as well as stick to decorative pieces, string or sew by hand. The combination of several different coloured satin ribbons is also beautiful. Vaessen Creative offers high-quality satin ribbons in three different widths (3, 6 and 9 mm) and 24 different colours. So you can choose the right band for any occasion. Let your imagination run wild.
